repos.name: video-translate-refine
repos.reason: Optional production-style video translation backend. Public releases expect users to clone or configure this backend separately.

repos.name: omnivoice-studio
repos.reason: Optional OmniVoice TTS backend. LogicCut exposes a /tts compatibility adapter on port 8391 and forwards to OmniVoice Studio's OpenAI-compatible audio endpoint.

repos.name: fish-speech
repos.reason: FishAudio / Fish Speech S2 TTS backend. Current local compatible /tts service runs on 8321; native Fish adapter can be started on 8392.

repos.name: rgad-crosslingual-tts
repos.reason: Recommended lightweight local cross-language TTS backend for small-machine foreign-to-Chinese dubbing. LogicCut selects it with --tts-engine rgad-tts and expects a /tts-compatible service on 8393.

repos.name: index-tts
repos.reason: IndexTTS2 TTS backend. Current local hot-spare gateway runs on 8304 and can be selected with --tts-engine indextts2.

repos.name: ai-youtube-shorts-generator
repos.reason: Primary reference adapter for highlight detection, shorts generation, Whisper transcription, and vertical cropping.

repos.name: auto-editor
repos.reason: Auxiliary rough-cut tool for removing silence and low-value segments before highlight clipping.

repos.name: openreel-video
repos.reason: Reference implementation for browser timeline, preview, and open-source CapCut-like editing UI.

repos.name: money-printer-turbo
repos.reason: Reference for one-click short-video generation workflow and product packaging.
